headline: Danaher Could Swing Over $7 Billion in Value After Earnings
summary: Earnings are back in focus on Tuesday, with a Benzinga-selected slate including Danaher Corp. (NYSE:DHR). Options pricing reveals traders are bracing for volatility, with Annaly Capital Management (NYSE:NLY) and The Charles Schwab Corp. (NYSE:SCHW) reporting. Both stocks have seen positive analyst ratings and are trading above their 200-day moving averages.
